text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Clothing Donation Programs * Women 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Children Disaster/Emergency Issues Infants/Toddlers Men Pregnant Individuals Women Youth Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF DRESS FOR SUCCESS OREGON DONATION CALL OUT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of business casual, casual, and trade clothing, scrubs, coats, shoes, purses, backpacks, new undergarments, makeup, toiletries, and jewelry. 1532 NE 37th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Donations are accepted on monthly donation days Email (503) 249-7300 107 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DRESS FOR SUCCESS OREGON DONATION CALL OUT
